description: 2.4 GHz FR4 patch, lambda/4 transformer edge feed (all-rectangular PEC, no notch slots). openEMS width-swept.

ground.note: extended on the feed(-x) side to host the feed; +x margin 15.25 mm and y width 55 mm kept from the stable 60x55 frame

feed_topology: lumped port -> 50 ohm line (w50,L50) -> lambda/4 transformer (w_t,L_t) -> patch radiating-edge centre, coplanar PEC at z=h

port.location: outer end of 50 ohm line, ground->line

solver_frame.note: coarse 3 mm / ratio 1.25 (finer than the probe frame's 5 mm/1.4) to bound the feed-triggered PML late-time growth
